title: sphagneticola trilobata
intro: Sphagneticola trilobata, also known as the wedelia or shepherd's needle, is an invasive perennial plant native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Sphagneticola trilobata include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
